location: Sold by the Hermit Merchant at Hermit Merchant's Shack for 7,000 Runes. The shack sits atop a cliff just inside Leyndell's outermost wall, in Capital Outskirts. From Outer Wall Battleground grace, climb the staircase to the east, then take a U-turn up onto the cliff to reach the shack.
tactics: The shack is above the Outer Wall Battleground grace in a valley — you'll need to climb up to it, not walk straight in
Coming from Leyndell instead, head northwest from the Capital Rampart grace
Its passive reveals invisible enemies, most notably Black Knife Assassins around Ordina, Liturgical Town and Sage's Cave, and exposes players using Concealing Veil-type invisibility
You don't need to actively wield it to get the detection benefit — keep it in an unused equipment slot while two-handing your main weapon
lore: Issued to the Erdtree's watchmen, this torch's flame carries a minor incantation that strips away magical concealment, letting its bearer spot assassins who would otherwise approach unseen — a precaution born from the capital's fear of a second Night of the Black Knives.

builds.name: Faith build off-hand
builds.why: Faith scaling adds to its Holy damage, giving Faith casters a melee-capable off-hand that also reveals invisible enemies.

builds.name: Strength/Faith hybrid
builds.why: Strength scaling alongside Faith suits quality-Faith hybrid builds wanting both physical and holy damage from the same weapon.
